x.summary:
I am teaching a few dozen parents and their kids how to set up Hermes this Sunday in SF with @Alphaschool.

videos.title: Codex for Creatives: Riff, Design, Ship
videos.summary:
“Codex is an art director or a creative director for me, helping me riff on ideas,” - Chad Nelson, creative specialist at OpenAI.  

Don’t sleep on Codex for creatives. It understands brand books, style guides, fonts, composition and can create ship-worthy full funnel campaign visuals in a few hours. 

Put Codex to work. Tell us what you create. 

https://lnkd.in/dnxrM282
videos.author: OpenAI

videos.title: Life Near OpenAI's Stargate Project
videos.summary:
For more than 40 years, Tom and Lisa Perini have welcomed visitors to their ranch and restaurant in Buffalo Gap, Texas, just outside Abilene.

As new investment and AI infrastructure arrive in the region, they've seen firsthand how growth can create new opportunities for local businesses while raising important questions about preserving the character of rural communities.

In this conversation, the Perinis reflect on what makes their community special, why they believe small towns need opportunity to thrive, and how they think about balancing growth with the traditions and way of life they hope will endure for generations to come.
videos.author: OpenAI

videos.title: Customer Ignite Talk: Antonio Bravo Acin (Global Head of AI Transformation, BBVA) & OpenAI
videos.author: OpenAI

videos.title: Build sales account strategies and outreach with Codex
videos.summary:
See how the sales plugin for Codex helps sales teams move from account context to seller-ready work.

In this demo, Codex prioritizes prospect accounts from Salesforce, creates a prospecting plan, drafts account-specific outreach, and sets up a morning cadence to keep the plan updated when account status changes.

More than 5 million people now use Codex every week, with sellers, marketers, operators, designers, researchers, investors, and bankers among the fastest-growing users.

Learn more: https://openai.com/index/codex-for-every-role-tool-workflow/
Try the plugin today: https://chatgpt.com/plugins/share/22ec24462a4a410bba1c56c099f6101c
videos.author: OpenAI

videos.title: Creating black hole simulations with Codex
videos.summary:
To learn more about black holes, computational astrophysicist Chi-kwan “CK” Chan is working to create the first moving image of one. CK creates simulations and compares them to observational data gathered at telescopes – but these don’t always match up. 

CK creates simulations and compares them to observational data gathered at telescopes – but these don’t always match up. So he uses Codex to generate new algorithms to test. It would normally take him ten days to create ten new algorithms. With Codex, it takes just a few minutes, making previously impossible simulations possible.

Learn how Codex is changing science in fundamental ways, and how it’s helping CK reach the edge of the universe.
videos.author: OpenAI
